text: Stepping from the quiet, cavernous corridor into this vividly colored, idea-filled exhibition, I feel the contrast acutely. The corridor feels sterile and solemn, echoing with anticipation, while the exhibition side bursts with energy and intellectual curiosity. Here, surrounded by bold patterns and the promise of research and development, I feel invigorated and oddly hopeful—open to insight, ready to play with concepts and the unknown. My role feels both passive observer and active participant, consciousness stretching between reflection and creation.
